name: one-up-on-wall-street
description: Peter Lynch's One Up On Wall Street — invest in what you know, identify tenbaggers, categorize companies by type, and build a winning portfolio using the edge individual investors have over professionals
useCase: Helps individual investors pick winning stocks using Peter Lynch's proven framework: the six company categories, the perfect stock criteria, PEG ratio valuation, and the two-minute drill for understanding any investment.
knownRisks: Lynch's methods are based on his experience managing Fidelity Magellan — past performance does not guarantee future results
Individual stock investing carries significant risk; diversification is essential
